text.title: Performance Testing Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Performance Testing. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report shows raw latency numbers; reviewer cannot tell pass/fail.
antipattern.fix: Author SLO + owner before any test run; bake into report header.
Switch to k6 or wrk2 with `--latency` and CO correction enabled.

antipattern.symptom: Staging passes; production fails at first 100 RPS.
antipattern.root-cause: Test ran on empty DB; planner picked different join order.
antipattern.fix: Restore production-volume snapshot to staging before any perf test.

antipattern.symptom: First 30s of report shows latency 3x steady-state.
antipattern.fix: Add ramp-up=60s to test config; metrics aggregator drops the warmup window.
